name: Literature Deep Reading
description: Bootstrap a literature deep-reading run from a source bundle, collect requested Host context, build analysis views, normalize block translations, and render the final self-contained HTML.

prompts.common: Use literature-deep-reading for source_bundle_path={{ input.source_bundle_path }}, target_language={{ parameter.target_language }}. Treat SKILL.md as the authoritative procedure. Start with scripts/deep_reading_runtime.py bootstrap using runtime/input.json, then follow runtime status, stage agent packets, and submit/validate gates until the final result is rendered. At completion, read literature-deep-reading.result.json and output exactly one JSON object containing `__SKILL_DONE__: true` plus all business fields from that file.
